title: It is... that/who + 強調部分（強調句）

formulas.formula: It is/was + 強調部分（人/事/物/時間/地點） + that + 剩餘句子
formulas.zh: 就是……（強調句中某一成分）

formulas.formula: It is/was + 強調部分（人） + who + 剩餘句子
formulas.zh: 就是某人……（強調人物時可用 who 替代 that）

explanation: 分裂句（cleft sentence）是將一個完整句子拆開，把要強調的部分放在 It is/was 與 that/who 之間，藉此突顯該成分。可強調主詞、受詞、時間副詞、地點副詞等，但不能強調動詞或形容詞。若強調的是「人」，that 可替換為 who；強調「物、時間、地點」則只用 that。判斷是否為分裂句的方法：將 It is/was 與 that/who 去掉後，剩餘部分應能還原為一個完整句子。時態上，主要事件在過去用 was，在現在或一般事實用 is。

examples.eng: It was my grandmother who taught me how to cook traditional dishes.
examples.chi: 就是我的祖母教我如何烹煮傳統菜餚。

examples.eng: It is hard work that leads to true success in the long run.
examples.chi: 就是努力付出才能在長遠中帶來真正的成功。

examples.eng: It was in the library that I found the book I had been looking for.
examples.chi: 就是在圖書館裡，我找到了一直在尋找的那本書。

examples.eng: It was not until midnight that she finally finished her research paper.
examples.chi: 直到午夜她才終於完成了她的研究報告。

extension.tip: 判斷分裂句的方法：將 It is/was 和 that/who 同時刪除，若剩下的部分能組成一個文法正確、語意完整的句子，就是分裂句。若刪除後句意不完整，則 It 可能是虛主詞或代名詞，並非分裂句結構。

examples.test: It was Tom that broke the window. → 去掉 It was 和 that → Tom broke the window.
examples.result: → 句意完整，確認為分裂句，強調主詞 Tom。

examples.test: It is important that you arrive on time.
examples.result: → 去掉 It is 和 that → important you arrive on time（不完整），這不是分裂句，而是虛主詞句型。

examples.test: It was yesterday that I met her. vs. I met her yesterday.
examples.result: → 分裂句強調時間 yesterday，還原後為完整句 I met her yesterday。

extension.note: 去掉 It is/was 和 that，能還原完整句就是分裂句！

parts: helped me get through the difficult time.
exercises.sentence: It was my best friend who helped me get through the difficult time.
exercises.translation: 就是我最好的朋友幫助我度過了那段艱難的時光。

parts: we enjoyed the most delicious street food.
exercises.sentence: It was in Tainan that we enjoyed the most delicious street food.
exercises.translation: 就是在台南，我們品嚐到了最美味的街頭小吃。

parts: gave me the courage to try again.
exercises.sentence: It was her encouragement that gave me the courage to try again.
exercises.translation: 就是她的鼓勵給了我再次嘗試的勇氣。

parts: she finally realized the importance of teamwork.
blanks: It was not until she failed that
exercises.sentence: It was not until she failed that she finally realized the importance of teamwork.
exercises.translation: 直到她失敗了，她才終於了解團隊合作的重要性。
